1	"""
2	Configuration management for Hermes Agent.
3	
4	Config files are stored in ~/.hermes/ for easy access:
5	- ~/.hermes/config.yaml  - All settings (model, toolsets, terminal, etc.)
6	- ~/.hermes/.env         - API keys and secrets
7	
8	This module provides:
9	- hermes config          - Show current configuration
10	- hermes config edit     - Open config in editor
11	- hermes config set      - Set a specific value
12	- hermes config wizard   - Re-run setup wizard
13	"""
14	
15	import os
16	import platform
17	import re
18	import stat
19	import subprocess
20	import sys
21	import tempfile
22	from pathlib import Path
23	from typing import Dict, Any, Optional, List, Tuple
24	
25	_IS_WINDOWS = platform.system() == "Windows"
26	_ENV_VAR_NAME_RE = re.compile(r"^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$")
27	# Env var names written to .env that aren't in OPTIONAL_ENV_VARS
28	# (managed by setup/provider flows directly).
29	_EXTRA_ENV_KEYS = frozenset({
30	    "OPENAI_API_KEY", "OPENAI_BASE_URL",
31	    "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "ANTHROPIC_TOKEN",
32	    "AUXILIARY_VISION_MODEL",
33	    "DISCORD_HOME_CHANNEL", "TELEGRAM_HOME_CHANNEL",
34	    "SIGNAL_ACCOUNT", "SIGNAL_HTTP_URL",
35	    "SIGNAL_ALLOWED_USERS", "SIGNAL_GROUP_ALLOWED_USERS",
36	    "DINGTALK_CLIENT_ID", "DINGTALK_CLIENT_SECRET",
37	    "FEISHU_APP_ID", "FEISHU_APP_SECRET", "FEISHU_ENCRYPT_KEY", "FEISHU_VERIFICATION_TOKEN",
38	    "WECOM_BOT_ID", "WECOM_SECRET",
39	    "TERMINAL_ENV", "TERMINAL_SSH_KEY", "TERMINAL_SSH_PORT",
40	    "WHATSAPP_MODE", "WHATSAPP_ENABLED",
41	    "MATTERMOST_HOME_CHANNEL", "MATTERMOST_REPLY_MODE",
42	    "MATRIX_PASSWORD", "MATRIX_ENCRYPTION", "MATRIX_HOME_ROOM",
43	})
44	
45	import yaml
46	
47	from hermes_cli.colors import Colors, color
48	from hermes_cli.default_soul import DEFAULT_SOUL_MD
49	
50	
51	# =============================================================================
52	# Managed mode (NixOS declarative config)
53	# =============================================================================
54	
55	_MANAGED_TRUE_VALUES = ("true", "1", "yes")
56	_MANAGED_SYSTEM_NAMES = {
57	    "brew": "Homebrew",
58	    "homebrew": "Homebrew",
59	    "nix": "NixOS",
60	    "nixos": "NixOS",
61	}
62	
63	
64	def get_managed_system() -> Optional[str]:
65	    """Return the package manager owning this install, if any."""
66	    raw = os.getenv("HERMES_MANAGED", "").strip()
67	    if raw:
68	        normalized = raw.lower()
69	        if normalized in _MANAGED_TRUE_VALUES:
70	            return "NixOS"
71	        return _MANAGED_SYSTEM_NAMES.get(normalized, raw)
72	
73	    managed_marker = get_hermes_home() / ".managed"
74	    if managed_marker.exists():
75	        return "NixOS"
76	    return None
77	
78	
79	def is_managed() -> bool:
80	    """Check if Hermes is running in package-manager-managed mode.
81	
82	    Two signals: the HERMES_MANAGED env var (set by the systemd service),
83	    or a .managed marker file in HERMES_HOME (set by the NixOS activation
84	    script, so interactive shells also see it).
85	    """
86	    return get_managed_system() is not None
87	
88	
89	def get_managed_update_command() -> Optional[str]:
90	    """Return the preferred upgrade command for a managed install."""
91	    managed_system = get_managed_system()
92	    if managed_system == "Homebrew":
93	        return "brew upgrade hermes-agent"
94	    if managed_system == "NixOS":
95	        return "sudo nixos-rebuild switch"
96	    return None
97	
98	
99	def recommended_update_command() -> str:
100	    """Return the best update command for the current installation."""
